description: A ground-level photograph depicting dry Mediterranean grasslands in the Extremadura region of South Western Spain. In the foreground, dry, light-brown and green grasses are visible, with a multi-strand barbed wire fence stretching horizontally across the middle of the frame. A dark, bare-branched tree trunk is positioned on the right side, partially obscuring the fence. The middle ground features a large, green pasture where several dark-coloured cattle are grazing, backed by a horizontal line of green trees. In the distant background, hazy mountains are visible under a pale, clear sky.
